title: Creative Mode Tweaks
description: Adds no-clip when flying, disables flight inertia and increases block reach distance in creative mode.
body:
[![Godlike Hosting](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1194310/description_85c75ece-38fc-4f49-929f-48dc7b8915b3.png)](https://affiliate.godlike.host/lightning-offer)

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/creative-mode-tweaks), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/creative-mode-tweaks)

# No more tedious building in creative mode!

Creative Mode Tweaks contains many tweaks to make your creative mode experience much easier!! Every feature is designed to blend in with the vanilla experience and is **highly configurable**, allowing players to fine-tune settings to their preference via a config file.

## **Make building easier with an expanded hotbar!**

Scroll through your entire inventory without the limitaitons of just 9 slots!

## **Noclip Mode**

Move seamlessly through blocks while in Creative Mode.

## **Extended Reach Distance**

Interact with blocks and entities from much farther away.

## **Disabled Flight Inertia**

No more sliding on ice! We tweaked the creative mode flight to match bedrocks creative flight controls. Fly with precision, eliminating the momentum delay when stopping.

## Night Vision

No more invis potion needed! A simple hotkey allows you to see under all light condigions, as well as increased visibility in fluids such as lava!

## **Replace Tool**

Instantly swap blocks without breaking and placing them manually.
